Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores dynamic string values for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest features and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString

Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and timely updates for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and responsiveness when dealing with time-related data in games.
